---
title: "Teresa Penprase"
---

## Teresa Penprase

**Dates:** (b.1791/2)

**Maiden name:** (Sholl)

### Description

neighbour of the Puslinch Yonges

### Biography

In the 1881 census Teresa Penprase was a widow living at Bain\'s Cottage, Newton Ferrars.  She had married (1818) at Newton Ferrars, Alexander Penprase (1787/8-1869).

### Letters

- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
